children.heading: Full (statement of duration) or limited warranty
children.label: a Full (statement of duration) or limited warranty

children.text: If the written warranty meets the Federal minimum standards for warranty set forth in , then it shall be conspicuously designated a “full (statement of duration) warranty”.section 2304 of this title
If the written warranty does not meet the Federal minimum standards for warranty set forth in , then it shall be conspicuously designated a “limited warranty”.section 2304 of this title

children.heading: Applicability of requirements, standards, etc., to representations or statements of customer satisfaction
children.label: b Applicability of requirements, standards, etc., to representations or statements of customer satisfaction
children.text: This section and sections 2302 and 2304 of this title shall not apply to statements or representations which are similar to expressions of general policy concerning customer satisfaction and which are not subject to any specific limitations.

children.heading: Exemptions by Commission
children.label: c Exemptions by Commission
children.text: In addition to exercising the authority pertaining to disclosure granted in , the Commission may by rule determine when a written warranty does not have to be designated either “full (statement of duration)” or “limited” in accordance with this section.section 2302 of this title

children.heading: Applicability to consumer products costing more than $10 and not designated as full warranties
children.label: d Applicability to consumer products costing more than $10 and not designated as full warranties
children.text: The provisions of subsections (a) and (c) of this section apply only to warranties which pertain to consumer products actually costing the consumer more than $10 and which are not designated “full (statement of duration) warranties”.
